description: Opaque account identifier (e.g. ``acct_000001``). Primary key.
Synthetic display name for the account (fictional). Not a feature in the snapshot.
Industry vertical of the buying organisation; one of the recipe's industry vocabulary.
Geographic region of the account's headquarters (e.g. ``US``, ``UK``).
Banded employee headcount of the account (e.g. ``200-500``, ``500-1000``, ``1000-2000``).
Banded estimated annual revenue of the account.
Banded internal process-maturity score of the account (drives ICP fit).
ISO-8601 timestamp when the account was first observed (synthetic creation time).
Opaque contact identifier (e.g. ``cont_000001``). Primary key.
FK to ``accounts.account_id`` — the buying organisation this contact belongs to.
Free-text job title (fictional). Used only for narrative colour; not a feature.
Functional area of the contact (e.g. ``finance``, ``ops``, ``it``, ``procurement``).
Seniority band of the contact (e.g. ``c_level``, ``vp``, ``director``, ``manager``).
Buyer-role classification (``economic_buyer``, ``champion``, ``technical_evaluator``, ``end_user``).
Type of email domain (e.g. ``corporate``, ``free``); never resolves to a real domain.
ISO-8601 timestamp when the contact record was first observed.
Opaque lead identifier (e.g. ``lead_000001``). Primary key for the lead-scoring task.
FK to ``contacts.contact_id`` — the primary contact attached to this lead.
FK to ``accounts.account_id`` — the buying organisation this lead belongs to.
ISO-8601 timestamp at which the lead was created (= snapshot anchor t=0).
Origination source of the lead (e.g. ``inbound_form``, ``sdr_outbound``, ``partner``).
Marketing channel responsible for the first recorded touch.
Opaque sales-rep id (e.g. ``rep_000001``) owning the lead at snapshot time.
Funnel stage at snapshot time. REDACTED in public bundles — the post-snapshot stage trajectory would leak the outcome.
Whether the lead has been marked Sales Qualified by snapshot time. REDACTED in public bundles — derived from post-snapshot SDR activity.
Target label (event-derived from a ``closed_won`` event within 90 days). REDACTED from ``tables/leads.parquet`` in public bundles; lives in ``tasks/converted_within_90_days/*.parquet`` instead.
ISO-8601 timestamp of the ``closed_won`` event, or null. REDACTED in public bundles.
Opaque touch identifier. Primary key.
FK to ``leads.lead_id``.
ISO-8601 timestamp of the touch. Public bundles filter to ``<= lead_created_at + snapshot_day`` per the redaction contract.
Mechanism of the touch (e.g. ``email``, ``call``, ``ad_view``, ``content_download``).
Marketing/sales channel attribution (e.g. ``paid_search``, ``content``, ``cold_outreach``).
``inbound`` (lead-initiated) or ``outbound`` (vendor-initiated).
Opaque campaign identifier attached to the touch, or null when unattributed.
Opaque session identifier. Primary key.
FK to ``leads.lead_id``.
ISO-8601 timestamp of the session start. Public bundles filter to ``<= lead_created_at + snapshot_day``.
Session type (e.g. ``marketing_site``, ``trial``, ``demo``).
Total page views during the session.
Page views landing on a pricing URL during the session.
Page views landing on a demo URL during the session.
Session duration in seconds.
Opaque sales-activity identifier. Primary key.
FK to ``leads.lead_id``.
Opaque sales-rep id performing the activity.
ISO-8601 timestamp of the activity. Public bundles filter to ``<= lead_created_at + snapshot_day``.
Activity mechanism (e.g. ``call``, ``email``, ``demo``, ``meeting``).
Logged outcome (e.g. ``connected``, ``voicemail``, ``no_answer``, ``meeting_set``).
Opaque opportunity identifier. Primary key.
FK to ``leads.lead_id``.
ISO-8601 timestamp the opportunity was created. Public bundles filter rows to ``<= lead_created_at + snapshot_day``.
Current stage at snapshot time (e.g. ``prospecting``, ``demo``, ``negotiation``).
Estimated annual contract value at snapshot time (USD).
Terminal outcome (``closed_won``/``closed_lost``). REDACTED in public bundles.
ISO-8601 timestamp of the terminal close event. REDACTED in public bundles.
Opaque customer identifier. Primary key. Entire ``customers`` table OMITTED from public bundles (its existence reconstructs the conversion label).
FK to ``opportunities.opportunity_id`` — the deal that converted into this customer record.
FK to ``accounts.account_id``.
ISO-8601 timestamp the account became a paying customer.
Opaque subscription identifier. Primary key. Entire ``subscriptions`` table OMITTED from public bundles.
FK to ``customers.customer_id``.
Subscription plan name (e.g. ``starter``, ``team``, ``enterprise``).
ISO-8601 timestamp the subscription started.
Subscription status (e.g. ``active``, ``churned``).
